ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag(s) used to identify literature notes in frontmatter. Separate multiple tags with commas or spaces (e.g., "literature_note, Excalidraw").
ast.target: 用于在前置元数据中标识文献笔记的标签。多个标签用逗号或空格分隔（例如，\"literature_note, Excalidraw\"）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically open a newly created literature note in the workspace
ast.target: 自动在工作区中打开新创建的文献笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Create a subfolder for each citation (e.g., biblib/citation-key/citation-key.pdf)
ast.target: 为每个引用创建一个子文件夹（例如，biblib/citation-key/citation-key.pdf）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The folder where literature notes will be stored. Use forward slashes for subfolders. Use "/" for vault.
ast.target: 存储文献笔记的文件夹。子文件夹使用正斜杠。使用 \"/\" 表示保险库根目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for generating literature note filenames. Uses the same template system as headers and frontmatter.
ast.target: 生成文献笔记文件名的模板。使用与标题和前置元数据相同的模板系统。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Template for the entire note body content. Define the complete structure of your literature notes here including headings, sections, and references. Frontmatter is configured separately.
ast.target: 整个笔记正文内容的模板。在此定义文献笔记的完整结构，包括标题、章节和参考文献。前置元数据单独配置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When importing from Zotero, use their citekey instead of generating one using the template above.
ast.target: 从Zotero导入时，使用其引用键，而不是使用上述模板生成。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Add a random suffix to citekeys shorter than this length
ast.target: 为短于此长度的引用键添加随机后缀

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include this field in new literature notes
ast.target: 在新文献笔记中包含此字段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The label shown in the modal

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional help text shown below the field
ast.target: 字段下方显示的可选帮助文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Mark as required (for UI hint only)
ast.target: 标记为必填（仅用于UI提示）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When editing a note, regenerate the citekey if relevant data changes
ast.target: 编辑笔记时，如果相关数据更改，则重新生成引用键

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When editing a note, update custom frontmatter fields from templates
ast.target: 编辑笔记时，根据模板更新自定义前置元数据字段

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When editing a note, regenerate the note body from the header template
ast.target: 编辑笔记时，根据标题模板重新生成笔记正文

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When the citekey changes during edit, rename the file to match
ast.target: 编辑期间引用键更改时，重命名文件以匹配

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow the plugin to receive data from the Zotero connector browser extension. Note: Zotero should not be running when using this feature.
ast.target: 允许插件接收来自Zotero连接器浏览器扩展的数据。注意：使用此功能时，Zotero不应正在运行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The port to use for the Zotero connector server. Default is 23119, which is the standard Zotero port.
ast.target: 用于Zotero连接器服务器的端口。默认为23119，这是Zotero的标准端口。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Optional: Specify a custom folder for temporarily storing pdfs downloaded from Zotero. Leave empty to use the system temp directory.
ast.target: 可选：指定一个自定义文件夹，用于临时存储从Zotero下载的PDF。留空则使用系统临时目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path where to save the bibliography.json file (relative to vault)
ast.target: 保存bibliography.json文件的路径（相对于保险库）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path where to save the citekeylist.md file (relative to vault)
ast.target: 保存citekeylist.md文件的路径（相对于保险库）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path where to save the exported bibtex file (relative to vault)
ast.target: 保存导出的bibtex文件的路径（相对于保险库）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Import a file or link to an existing vault file
ast.target: 导入文件或链接到现有的保险库文件

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Link existing notes that relate to this entry
ast.target: 链接与此条目相关的现有笔记

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select existing notes in your vault that relate to this chapter.

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Generate a new citekey based on current data (may rename the file)

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Re-evaluate custom frontmatter field templates with current data
ast.target: 使用当前数据重新评估自定义前置元数据字段模板

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Replace the entire note body with the header template
ast.target: 用标题模板替换整个笔记正文

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This feature (JSON output with special formatting) is unstable. See https://github.com/larsgw/citation.js/issues/144

ast.name: warn
ast.source:
getEntities accepts 50 ids max to match Wikidata API limitations:
      this request won't get all the desired entities.
      You can use getManyEntities instead to generate several request urls
      to work around this limitation
ast.target:
getEntities 最多接受 50 个 ID 以匹配 Wikidata API 限制：
      此请求将无法获取所有所需实体。
      您可以改用 getManyEntities 来生成多个请求 URL
      以绕过此限制

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将参考文献导出为 BibTeX

ast.name: name
ast.target: 切换 Zotero 连接器服务器

ast.name: placeholder
ast.target: 字段名称（例如，标签、关键词）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use this playground to experiment with template syntax and see the results in real-time.
ast.target: 使用此游乐场来试验模板语法并实时查看结果。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 前置元数据如何处理此模板：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在 biblib 中创建数组：

ast.name: text
ast.source: To create arrays in biblib templates, use the JSON array format with square brackets, commas, and quotes:
ast.target: 要在 biblib 模板中创建数组，请使用带方括号、逗号和引号的 JSON 数组格式：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 在前置元数据中正确渲染：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Using dash prefixes will not automatically create arrays:
ast.target: 使用破折号前缀不会自动创建数组：

ast.name: text
ast.source: This renders as multi-line text, not an array:
ast.target: 这会渲染为多行文本，而不是数组：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Biblib uses a powerful template system across all content. Templates use a mustache-like syntax for literature notes, filenames, and frontmatter fields.
ast.target: Biblib 在所有内容中使用一个强大的模板系统。模板使用类似 mustache 的语法来处理文献笔记、文件名和前置元数据字段。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 模板系统指南（点击展开）

ast.name: text
ast.source: The template system supports variable replacement, formatting options, conditionals, and loops.
ast.target: 模板系统支持变量替换、格式化选项、条件判断和循环。

ast.name: text
ast.source: These variables are arrays that can be used with loop syntax:
ast.target: 这些变量是数组，可以与循环语法一起使用：

ast.name: text
ast.source: To create YAML arrays in frontmatter templates, use JSON array syntax with square brackets:
ast.target: 要在前置元数据模板中创建 YAML 数组，请使用带方括号的 JSON 数组语法：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Important: Arrays must be valid JSON to be processed correctly. Common issues to avoid:
ast.target: 重要提示：数组必须是有效的 JSON 才能正确处理。需要避免的常见问题：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the template playground in YAML mode to test your array templates.
ast.target: 使用 YAML 模式下的模板游乐场来测试您的数组模板。

ast.name: text
ast.source: You can format any variable using pipe syntax:
ast.target: 您可以使用管道语法格式化任何变量：

ast.name: text
ast.source: When iterating through arrays, you can use these special variables to control formatting:
ast.target: 遍历数组时，您可以使用这些特殊变量来控制格式：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 使用位置元数据的示例：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Would produce: "1. John smith, 2. Maria rodriguez, 3. Wei zhang."
ast.target: 将产生：\"1. John smith, 2. Maria rodriguez, 3. Wei zhang.\"

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use dot notation to access nested properties and array items:
ast.target: 使用点表示法访问嵌套属性和数组项：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Try out different templates and see the results instantly with sample data.
ast.target: 尝试不同的模板，并使用示例数据即时查看结果。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure templates used to generate literature notes.
ast.target: 配置用于生成文献笔记的模板。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure how citekeys are generated for new literature notes.
ast.target: 配置新文献笔记的引用键生成方式。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Define custom frontmatter fields with templated values. These will be added to new literature notes.
ast.target: 定义带有模板值的自定义前置字段。这些字段将被添加到新的文献笔记中。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Using csl fields in custom templates may cause:
ast.target: 在自定义模板中使用 CSL 字段可能导致：

ast.name: text
ast.target: 与参考文献导出工具冲突

ast.name: text
ast.source: Define the template for this frontmatter field.
ast.target: 定义此前置字段的模板。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure frequently used languages to appear at the top of language dropdowns in modals.
ast.target: 配置常用语言，使其在模态框的语言下拉菜单中置顶显示。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure which csl-compliant fields appear as primary inputs in the "create literature note" modal.
ast.target: 配置哪些符合 CSL 规范的字段作为“创建文献笔记”模态框中的主要输入项。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This is useful for workflows that frequently use specific fields (e.g., archival research needing archive, archive-place, archive_location).
ast.target: 这对于经常使用特定字段的工作流程非常有用（例如，档案研究需要 archive、archive-place、archive_location 字段）。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure default behavior when editing existing literature notes.
ast.target: 配置编辑现有文献笔记时的默认行为。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure settings for the Zotero connector integration. Note: This feature is only available on desktop.
ast.target: 配置 Zotero 连接器集成的设置。注意：此功能仅在桌面端可用。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enable the Zotero connector option above
ast.target: 启用上方的 Zotero 连接器选项

ast.name: text
ast.source: Use the Zotero connector browser extension as normal
ast.target: 像往常一样使用 Zotero 连接器浏览器扩展

ast.name: text
ast.source: When saving an item, the Zotero connector will send the data to Obsidian instead of Zotero
ast.target: 保存条目时，Zotero 连接器会将数据发送到 Obsidian 而不是 Zotero

ast.name: text
ast.source: The bibliography modal will open with the data pre-filled
ast.target: 参考文献模态框将打开并预填数据

ast.name: text
ast.source: Any PDF attachments will be downloaded and automatically linked
ast.target: 任何 PDF 附件都将被下载并自动链接

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: You can toggle this feature with the "toggle Zotero connector server" command.
ast.target: 注意：您可以使用“切换 Zotero 连接器服务器”命令来切换此功能。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Configure settings for the bibliography builder command.
ast.target: 配置参考文献生成器命令的设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source: This field name is not a standard CSL variable and may not be compatible with other tools.
ast.target: 此字段名称不是标准 CSL 变量，可能与其他工具不兼容。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 从标识符或 BibTeX 自动填充

ast.name: text
ast.source: This operation may create multiple files in your vault.
ast.target: 此操作可能会在您的保险库中创建多个文件。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Warning: This operation may create or overwrite many files. Consider backing up your vault first.
ast.target: 警告：此操作可能会创建或覆盖许多文件。建议先备份您的保险库。

ast.name: text
ast.source: In Zotero, select items and use "export items..." (not better bibtex)
ast.target: 在 Zotero 中，选择条目并使用“导出条目...”（不要使用 better bibtex）

ast.name: text
ast.target: 选择格式“bibtex”并勾选“导出文件”

ast.name: text
ast.source: Save the exported bibliography.bib and files/ folder to your vault
ast.target: 将导出的 bibliography.bib 和 files/ 文件夹保存到您的保险库

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select the bibliography.bib file in this dialog
ast.target: 在此对话框中选择 bibliography.bib 文件

ast.name: text
ast.source: Important: You must move the entire export folder (with the files/ subdirectory) into your vault before importing to ensure attachments are found.
ast.target: 重要提示：您必须将整个导出文件夹（包含 files/ 子目录）移入您的保险库，然后才能导入，以确保附件能被找到。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Choose which parts of the note should be updated when saving changes:
ast.target: 选择保存更改时应更新笔记的哪些部分：

ast.name: text
ast.source: Regenerating the note body will replace all content you've added to this note with the header template. This action cannot be undone.
ast.target: 重新生成笔记正文将用标题模板替换您已添加到此笔记的所有内容。此操作无法撤销。

ast.name: title
ast.target: 用于气候预测的神经网络
